sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_factorial (value Int32, factorial_value UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_factorial (value, factorial_value) VALUES (5, factorial(5));
INSERT INTO test_factorial (value, factorial_value) VALUES (10, factorial(10));
SELECT value, factorial_value FROM test_factorial WHERE value >= 0;
UPDATE test_factorial SET factorial_value = factorial(value) WHERE value < 5;
